## Checklist

- [ ] `corepack pnpm validate` passes (conformance + parity + tests + build)
- [ ] Behavior changes land in BOTH languages with shared fixture coverage
- [ ] Regenerated expected fixtures (if any) are explained above
- [ ] Docs updated (guides use YAML frontmatter and status labels)
- [ ] No credentials, live payloads, or tenant-specific identifiers
- [ ] No live Google Chat calls were made, or they stayed inside the
      documented smoke boundary with resources and cleanup noted
